changelog: TELEMETRY — Added per-session PlaybackTelemetry that hooks every Player.Listener and AnalyticsListener event for the entire DVR playback session, plus an HTTP probe of the stream URL (HEAD + Range GET first 64 KB checking for ftyp / moov / moof markers). Auto-POSTs to https://hushtv.xyz/crash/ tagged kind=playback_telemetry on screen exit. Captures: state transitions, isPlaying changes, video & audio format negotiation, decoder name + init time, RENDERED FIRST FRAME timing, downstream format changes, dropped frames, codec errors, load started / completed / canceled / errored with byte counts and durations, video size, track selection, position discontinuities. Lets us find the exact reason a recording isn't rendering without guessing.
Black-screen DVR fix attempts from v1.44.32 / v1.44.33 are still in place (MIME hint, synchronous playWhenReady=true, 30 s VOD stall threshold, server-side HEAD support).
Mandatory:true — install once and the next time you tap a recording the telemetry uploads on exit.
